zh.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bromwich是Sir John de Bromwich的女兒，於大約1339年出生在英國可瓦爾。她於大約1362年與Sir John Talbot在英國英格蘭賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1381年享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bromwich是Sir John de Bromwich的女儿，于大约1339年出生在英国可瓦爾。她于大约1362年与Sir John Talbot在英国英格兰賀福爾利哈達斯 卡素结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1381年享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bromwich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from West Bromwich (Staffs) or Castle and Little Bromwich (Warwicks).

variants.name: Bromage
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Worcestershire): habitational name from West Bromwich in Staffordshire, or Castle and Little Bromwich in Warwickshire, named in Old English with brōm ‘broom’ (the shrub) + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’. Compare Brumage .

variants.name: Brimage
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Brumage  . This name is comparatively rare in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bromwich was born about 1339, in Cornwall, England as the daughter of Sir John de Bromwich. She married Sir John Talbot about 1362, in Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1381, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bromwich est née environ 1339, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, fille de Sir John de Bromwich. Elle a épousé Sir John Talbot environ 1362, à Richard's Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1381, à l’âge de 43 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bromwichは約1339年にイギリスコルンワルでSir John de Bromwichの娘として生まれた。約1362年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャード'ス カストルでSir John Talbotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1381年に43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bromwich(은)는 대략 1339년 영국 코른월에서 Sir John de Bromwich의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1362년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 리처드'스 카스틀에서 Sir John Talbot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1381년 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Catherine de Bromwich родилась около 1339 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. Её отца звали Sir John de Bromwich. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Talbot около 1362 г. в местности ричард'с кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1381 г. в возрасте 43 лет.
